message:
fix(dep_tree): use unicode-width for visual-column-aware truncation

Char-count truncation was incorrect for wide characters (CJK, emoji)
which occupy 2 visual columns. Switch to unicode_width crate so
truncation respects actual terminal column width. Add ASCII and
short-string test cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
